entries.observation: Fuel mixture prepared and refilled into grass cutting equipment before field maintenance operations.
Gate INF-GATE-0002 opened to allow access between HZ-02 and HZ-01 for scheduled maintenance activities.
Grass cutting equipment positioned and prepared for vegetation maintenance operations within HZ-01.
Grass cutting activities completed. Vegetation condition and cleared operational area documented following maintenance work.
Gate INF-GATE-0002 closed and secured following completion of grass cutting and maintenance activities.

summary: Field maintenance operations were conducted within HZ-01 using grass cutting equipment EQP-GRC-0001. Activities included fuel preparation, access gate operation, equipment preparation, vegetation management, and operational closure. Maintenance work was completed and site access controls were restored after activities concluded.
